title: www.drybulkETF.com - February 18, 2020
summary: Will dry bulk be the coronavirus epidemic recovery trade? - Dry bulk shipping remains in the doldrums, with If history is a guide expect an impressive rally later in the year - Given the severity of the decline in dry bulk Futures are pricing some recovery, but not meaningful - The dry bulk futures market is currently in contango, It is the demand side this time around - The industry is facing a much different challenge this time around
